creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Thu, 27 Sep 2001 16:31:50 -0700 (PDT),
 Ed Alley wrote:
 > 	Incidentally: I am told by the author of Yorick that an important
 > 	bug fix is about to be released as yorick-1.5.03.tgz. When this
 > 	happens, the soft-link will be moved to this new source and
 > 	the FreeBSD users will be left behind unless the version number
 > 	in the Makefile is changed from 1.5.02 to 1.5.
 
 FreeBSD ports system does not like to track automatically "the latest
 and greatest" software released without changing its filename. It
 breaks the meaning of distinfo and we don't want to fix it
 everytime. If you want ports-current handling latest software, please
 send-pr to report it. Thanks.
 
 -- 
 FUJISHIMA Satsuki
